title: Antique Rockets
description: Replaces paper with bamboo in the firework rocket recipe. (commissioned by `silvertheabsol`)
body:
Replaces paper with bamboo in the firework rocket recipe. (commissioned by `silvertheabsol` on Discord)

That's all. (it's just a single mixin!)
